sources.claim: Same-directory temporary write plus atomic replace and fsync/parent fsync is the durable write pattern used by atomicwrites guidance.
Path traversal prevention requires canonicalizing paths and ensuring the resolved path remains under an intended allowed directory.
OWASP describes traversal via ../ and absolute path manipulation as access outside intended directories.
Strict JSON should deny non-finite values; Python json exposes allow_nan=False to reject them.
